name: Cam Circle VR
short_description: Cam Circle VR is a mixed reality (MR) tool that shows part of your real world in VR. Activate it by double tapping the headset or by pressing both grip buttons.Cam Circle currently supports HTC Vive, Vive Pro 1, Vive Pro 2 and Valve Index headsets.
detailed_description:
Cam Circle VR is a mixed reality (MR) tool that shows part of your real world in VR.
Activate it by double tapping the headset or by pressing both grip buttons.

Cam Circle currently supports HTC Vive, Vive Pro 1, Vive Pro 2 and Valve Index headsets.

Cam Circle can be used while running other VR software and games.
about_the_game:
